caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain dark background. She wears a light green tunic with red and gold embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. A small black lavalier microphone is clipped to the front of her shirt. In the lower-left corner of each frame, there is a logo accompanied by the text "NPTEL". Across the sequence, the woman remains centered in a medium shot, talking and gesturing slightly with her head and facial expressions. Her mouth is open in varying stages of speech, indicating she is in the middle of a presentation or lecture. The lighting is consistent, focusing on the woman while the background remains a solid, dark void. No other people or objects are visible in the scene.
